title: Bridge Essay: Heart Rate Variability of a Student Pilot During Flight Training.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Heart Rate Variability of a Student Pilot During Flight Training.** — Aerosp Med Hum Perform. PMID: 37194170. DOI: 10.3357/AMHP.6220.2023. BACKGROUND: Heart rate (HR) indicates the number of beats per minute (bpm) of the heart, while heart rate variability (HRV) indicates the temporal fluctuation of the intervals between adjacent beats (NN). HRV expresses neuro-cardiac activity and is generated by heart-brain interactions and dynamics related to the function of the autonomic nervous system (ANS) and other components (e.g., body and ambient temperature, respiration, hormones, blood pressure). We are carrying out aseries of experime
